designer.label: MEET
designer.name: NILAKSHI ROY
bio: Nilakshi Roy is the Founder and Principal Designer of Maati Interiors. Trained in architecture and deeply attuned to the emotional and sensory experience of space, she brings a thoughtful, human-centered perspective to every project.

Her approach balances design precision with intuition — exploring how light, material, and proportion shape the way we feel in our homes. Guided by empathy and craftsmanship, Nilakshi creates spaces that are not only beautiful, but grounding — quiet reflections of the people who live in the space.

studio.label: THE
studio.name: STUDIO
description: At Maati Interiors, we believe that a well-designed home should feel as good as it looks. Our work is guided by a quiet sense of luxury — spaces that are calm yet expressive, minimal yet deeply lived-in. Every project is approached with warmth and intention, grounded in natural materials, layered neutrals, and textures that invite touch and ease.

Our aesthetic is rooted in sensory awareness — designing not only for the eye, but for how a space feels, sounds, and supports everyday life. We blend modern craftsmanship with organic imperfection, curating each element to create interiors that nurture connection, comfort, and well-being.
